---
title: "Talks"
page-layout: article
---

```{=html}
<p class="page-subtitle">Conference presentations, posters, and invited talks.</p>

<div class="sk-empty-state">
  <div class="empty-icon">🎤</div>
  <h3>No talks yet — stay tuned.</h3>
  <p>Presentations and posters will appear here as they happen.</p>
</div>
```
